text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Gone in a flash. I can hardly believe summer camp
is over already.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: The Mainichi Okan is just a month away.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Which means! We can finally SETTLE THE
SCOOORE!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, El. I see you're as energetic as ever today.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And you're as tranquila as ever!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But... Heh heh! I know ya reached a new level this
summer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's what I love to see! That's why we've gotta
do this!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You got that? I'll be waitin' for ya at the Mainichi
Okan!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Um, I hate to put a damper on your dramatic exit,
but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I see you every day. We're going back home to
the same exact dorm room, and we'll be sitting
next to each other for the whole bus ride there.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: C'mon! Por favor! You're supposed to play along!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my summer camp with Grass Wonder
comes to a close!
